summary: BTC is worth continued monitoring for a medium-term thesis.
bull_case: BTC has enough narrative and ecosystem surface area for follow-up research.
BTC can be tracked through catalysts, tokenomics, and momentum changes.
The protocol sits in the Canonical Bridge category, which helps frame where catalysts should come from.
bear_case: BTC may fail to sustain attention if catalysts weaken.
BTC still requires deeper validation on execution and valuation.
